title: Umami Silky Festive Amaranth Stir-fry
description: A festive Jamaican dish featuring umami-rich amaranth stir-fried with a savory blend of plant-based ingredients including Sriracha and tadka, perfect for a light dinner or snack.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add amaranth and stir fry until lightly browned.
In the same pan, add minced garlic and diced onion, sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add red bell pepper and stir for another minute. Pour in Sriracha sauce and toss well to combine all ingredients.
To finish, drizzle a tadka with mustard seeds, cumin, and crushed roasted peanuts, swirling it into the dish for a vibrant flavor.
Season to taste with salt and lemon juice if desired. Serve hot as a vegan dinner or snack.
